name: Phil Carr
bio: Phil Carr serves as the Mayor of Daingerfield, the county seat of Morris County. Daingerfield is known for nearby Daingerfield State Park and its iron and steel industry heritage. The mayor presides over city council meetings and works to maintain city services for the community.
campaignPromises: Support economic development and job retention
Improve city infrastructure and water systems
Promote Daingerfield State Park and local tourism
Enhance community programs and quality of life
